---
title: "Lexical Stowaways"
---


```{=html}
<ol reversed>
  <li>[Congeries](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcrimjus.2026.102700){target="_blank"}: a disorderly collection or jumble of things gathered into a single mass.</li>
  <li>[Defugalty](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcrimjus.2025.102578){target="_blank"}: an informal, often humorous, or intentional mispronunciation of the word "difficulty".</li>
  <li>[Kludges](https://doi.org/10.1177/1098611120944387){target="_blank"}: an ill-assorted collection of parts assembled to fulfill a particular purpose.</li>

</ol>
